entries.gt_0342c80846c8bc: If the siren starts, I close the room. I only share air for free, and not always.
entries.gt_03952f325632cd: A raid does not come for truth. It comes for a list that can be sold twice.
entries.gt_03f8bad569c754: Debt sticks here worse than slime. At least you can see slime.
entries.gt_06cda24ba34758: Tell Ira: the quiet room is ready. Entry through the service route, no extra names.
entries.gt_06d077d8b788b0: The antibiotic ran out faster than morals. Filters go into debt too.
entries.gt_07c2704b6fa42f: Back door found: now decide what pays for the route - key, paper, or silence.
entries.gt_0adfd4d18dab62: Nil: "Two voluntary receipts from the debt card archive. Risk - the book will notice an empty square. Reward - a line can be paid, rewritten, or lost."
entries.gt_1064583ce6feb3: A debt without a signature is a request. A debt with a signature is a route.
entries.gt_11cb3f202ad1f3: A choice is marked at the debt office: the safe gives a pass or a lever, but the guards record the path to the back door.
entries.gt_155eadd419a12d: The line is closed. The person is not, yet.
entries.gt_18587cad212b50: Nil: "Bring a blank form and ink. Risk - the forgery holds until the first inspection. Reward - one line will start looking paid off."
entries.gt_1875daa8016eaf: Do not speak for me to Roza. Say too much and the debt will be rewritten onto my voice.
entries.gt_1bb7dff42fc80e: Venya: "Need the key from the plate of receipts. Return it to the post and the back entrance opens on business, but debt will remember the hand."
entries.gt_1d3dfad8e990b4: The client leaves, the receipt stays. That is why I remember doors, not faces.
entries.gt_1ed32b6a77bdab: They do not write gratitude in the ledger. It only shows empty squares and deadlines.
entries.gt_23051b499d434a: Today I know who kept quiet properly. That costs more than guards.
entries.gt_23d124e5c0a720: A raid list costs more than a cartridge because it fires before the shot.
entries.gt_2fab19cc161fd7: I am not kind and I am not an inspector. I count who reaches the quiet rooms before the raid.
entries.gt_3047d7a24b7175: the compromat safe is dangerous because of guards; reward - pass, lever, or service exit
entries.gt_342c6b8a9dcb52: Whoever hides from a raid breathes first. Explanations come later.
entries.gt_3ad5d2efbb9226: When samosbor is behind the wall, the most expensive thing is not a bunk. The most expensive thing is not being on the list.
entries.gt_3da25061ee9c14: Interest is not evil. It just wakes up before the debtor.
entries.gt_3eb589c6c2f013: Ira: "Find the denunciation in the safe and give it to me. Risk - guards and an official. Reward - one door stops holding a person by a line."
entries.gt_4135bb88f0cb17: If a debtor is being hidden, the door is closed from inside. If they are being sold, from outside.
entries.gt_44dcc3641d44b6: The floor stands on adult deals and closed doors. Anyone who confuses silence with rights learns debt fast.
entries.gt_46298cc1add9f3: Floor 69: card archive and Nil's desk. Risk: paper inspection at the post. Reward: receipt, fake pass, and passage through debt.
entries.gt_46bf2c5a7f232c: This room has a lock. I have a memory. Both work better than threats.
entries.gt_46d4a9fca4c244: Key from the Plate of Receipts 69
entries.gt_4adea5e5dc5f5a: Raids like noisy heroes. Quiet people leave through the service route.
entries.gt_4b69f59e3aa0c8: The post is simple: weapons visible, papers on the desk, do not touch other people's doors.
entries.gt_50901eece3a608: The map at the post whispers route 69: key and receipt risk a raid, but the quiet room gives water, bandage, and complaint.
entries.gt_5185bc1e7bc9ec: A room stays quiet while it has a key, a line, and a person who pays interest on time.
entries.gt_543c793d5a2f6f: Floor 69: inspection-post box. Risk: Liquidators learn who held the list. Reward: a key and time for the quiet rooms.
entries.gt_544ef54dd62ddb: If you want to earn, do not pretend this is kindness.
entries.gt_58e2abdc34b3cd: The clinic behind the wall is not kind, but they wash their hands before the logbook.
entries.gt_5bd336c0acbef3: The fewer sheets in the safe, the quieter this floor.
entries.gt_5cff83d2f4a276: Guest by the Plate of Receipts
entries.gt_5e6cd6f6cd10d5: Floor 69: compromat safe. Risk: the act pulls witnesses upstairs. Reward: forms, ink, and less blackmail held by the guards.
entries.gt_64326c74303322: The back entrance is not the secret. The secret is who wrote you down as entering.
entries.gt_69658c8283f64e: Guards do not save. Guards decide who is not touched first.
entries.gt_69e10a52f991a2: If the list is gone, someone has already chosen a side.
entries.gt_6a9db055855504: A quiet room costs more when the siren is already close.
entries.gt_6ab63ff8125158: I am an adult and I work here by my own rules. First rule: not in front of everyone and not for free.
entries.gt_6cc8cfc88bf809: Floor 69: compromat safe in the debt office. Risk: guards and an official tail. Reward: Ira's trust, a certificate, and less power in the safe.
entries.gt_6f117d871a5477: Sima holds the door. That means there is still a place where people are not traded.
entries.gt_6f9f7498a05ea2: The black record in the safe is not about love. It is about power afraid of witnesses.
entries.gt_75662d6a7dc45f: Bad timing here means more expensive. There is no other threat in that phrase.
entries.gt_7d0a052402e02c: The quiet room stayed behind: witness and debt depend on the post again.
entries.gt_7d0ead35b01eda: Floor 69: Sima's quiet clinic. Risk: medicine is counted as debt. Reward: sanitary kit, filter, and medical trust.
entries.gt_7f963cc73539a8: Do not sell the record to the first official. The second gives more and asks fewer questions.
entries.gt_828b6db7084368: The plate of receipts at the entrance decides fast: pay with paper and go through the post; steal the key and go under eyes.
entries.gt_83d1acd64f6399: The paper burned. It smells better than fear.
entries.gt_856a3a2b72e71a: Sima asks about pulse, Roza asks about deadline, Nil asks for a signature. I will ask who saw you.
entries.gt_8701ef93cc2c00: Venya: "There is a raid list in the post. Take it and we warn the quiet rooms. Sell it or hand it to inspectors - that is already your risk and your reward."
entries.gt_8ca276c99f0f79: If you found someone else's compromat, decide at once: hide it, turn it in, or count the profit.
entries.gt_8e37cd9eaffbaa: If Roza asks, I am working. If the raid asks, I was not here.
entries.gt_8e6d21eb6d6f81: In the book you weigh less than in the corridor. In the corridor they argue; in the book they pay.
entries.gt_8f8d0ef76b3ed7: Doctor Sima: "Need an antibiotic. I am not asking whether you buy, steal, or trade it. Risk - shortage, reward - a door where they treat first."
entries.gt_90757ae09f7010: I will give the key. The door will later ask who let you in.
entries.gt_91baead2fffe38: Market 88 buys deadlines, not people. That only sounds more decent in the ledger.
entries.gt_91cbc39d68bcac: If you want to help, find the raid list before the raid.
entries.gt_95dcac0817310f: Passage is softer today. Do not mistake that for trust.
entries.gt_989d1da30d8851: Cash runs out. There is no paper. That is why debt lives longer than a person here.
entries.gt_a7eaf206d36174: If you bring Sima an antibiotic, half the floor will stop coughing onto other people's secrets.
entries.gt_aad9a9999e9617: Ira: "Arrange a quiet room with Doctor Sima. Risk - raid list. Reward - safe entry through the service route."
entries.gt_b5db47ebf15ce7: Raids like the noisy. The quiet pay in advance.
entries.gt_b6f533f3bfc933: Sweetheart, you may look at the price tag. Look at the door too: raids walk quieter than clients.
entries.gt_b80bb6a7968056: post, key, and receipt bring raid risk; quiet room gives water, bandage, and complaint
entries.gt_ba1abb29eeccdf: Floor 69: plate of entry receipts at the post. Risk: theft from the queue. Reward: back entrance, cartridges, and water coupon.
entries.gt_bb4c37faa4464d: I do not need a rescuer. I need someone who knows how to keep quiet at the right door.
entries.gt_bf30bb152e1540: Floor 69: compromat safe behind the post. Risk: guards and raid line. Reward: fake pass, money, or leverage for protection.
entries.gt_c2bbdc627810cd: Safe and back door stayed behind: the short route 69 again passes through the post.
entries.gt_c3bd14175c7a00: Debts love order. People love order less.
entries.gt_c6bbe59e143ddd: If you want to leave clean, do not take paper you are not ready to read aloud.
entries.gt_cd01c1b0865077: I am not asking for pity. Pity cheapens fast, and a key holds its price.
entries.gt_cefd3478d2f7dc: A receipt can be bought back with rubles, forged with a blank form, stolen with a key, or sold to those who like raids.
entries.gt_d0db7d8742cbb6: Floor 69: Sima's clinic and the quiet room nearby. Risk: raid comes by the list. Reward: shelter, pills, and trust.
entries.gt_d1bc67e02cdb1f: The quiet room is open to adults who need a doctor, not a protocol.
entries.gt_d288adb37ee348: A black line in the logbook is treated three ways: pay, forge, burn.
entries.gt_d765df6691a32d: Do not confuse gratitude with an invitation. The boundary stayed; the door just became ours.
entries.gt_dac336086d906f: Roza: "There is a denunciation on an official in the safe. Bring it to me and the risk at the post becomes your bonus, not someone else's leash."
entries.gt_ddae9e546a924b: The quiet room is open. This is not the end of debt, but it is no longer a cage.
entries.gt_de4aa24e999612: The mark led to quiet room 69: check the water, complaint, and service exit before the raid.
entries.gt_e26faa3decbf53: Nil: "Bring the act on a missing record. Risk - upstairs they will ask for a witness. Reward - compromat stops being goods."
entries.gt_e2c421bb8cff99: The book is lighter today. This is not mercy; someone paid off a line in time.
entries.gt_e7cb4631e6058a: Our boundaries are simple: door, price, the word no. Whoever does not understand talks to Venya.
entries.gt_e7ef77d8de9f44: A witness is not hidden for free. For free, others find them later.
entries.gt_ed6a48a768c46f: The clinic does not ask your profession. The clinic asks pulse, water, and what to bandage with.
entries.gt_ed9229d4752517: The guards smile when they count someone else's money. When they count someone else's names, it is already late.
entries.gt_ee6f1ca377f7a4: Stock has been refilled. Now we can treat, not just choose a queue.
entries.gt_f4d488adb7052e: A line can be burned. Debt does not count as smoke, but people believe while it is dark.
entries.gt_f5776b7ce22a16: Floor 69: debt card archive. Risk: an empty line calls guards. Reward: official stub, blank form, and a leash removed.
entries.gt_f72123b365fc60: Do not touch the complaint under sealing wax without a plan. Sometimes the wax holds not paper, but a person.
entries.gt_061d48fa86ec1c: Today the notebook is closed. Tomorrow Misha opens it again on your line.
entries.gt_0b7a5c8779ee75: The kitchen asks for groats, the NII asks for a jar, the Ministry asks for a signature. A price is enough for me.
entries.gt_0df5910dbd4e3e: After a raid, crates empty themselves. Cheaper than explaining.
entries.gt_1474dde795488f: Need goods without questions - pay before the siren. After the siren, questions arrive by themselves.
entries.gt_1bfaa825916764: If the paper is silent, the deal is still alive.
entries.gt_1e3f0c1e20f330: Thank you. I am quieter now than I owed.
entries.gt_29385ded99638b: The kitchen has cheap rumors, but they are hot. The market has expensive ones, but with an address.
entries.gt_29fa8ad1fd4b3b: A clean stamp opens dirty doors. A dirty stamp opens them faster.
entries.gt_2bf4509c93121b: The cashbox is open. The crate is closed. Those are different news.
entries.gt_30145c70d6c1d6: If you took from the crate without asking, run before I finish counting.
entries.gt_32023c99f79cde: A wet coupon goes at half price. A wet debtor goes in a separate column.
entries.gt_330ade5efc4e01: Raid warning: weapons and documents hidden, no raid loot.
entries.gt_351cb2377ca507: I trade water for a filter, filter for passage, passage for silence. Money is just shorter.
entries.gt_35c9578e5d2161: The eighty-eighth does not sell salvation. It sells deferment.
entries.gt_39415af6105795: Take goods on debt and you leave a name. A name costs more than a ruble here.
entries.gt_39d6e8e8e7df74: The guns are closed if heat is above norm. Norm is small here.
entries.gt_3e20d6126b0385: Dry filter? One price. Dry filter without a surname? Another price.
entries.gt_3e5c8cdc0a8643: Hide me until all-clear and you get a route they have not managed to sell yet.
entries.gt_4146255378dca7: Marta Eighth: "Bring an antibiotic to the night stock. There will be money, but the main goods are trust."
entries.gt_41a7a3f0cc1b0d: Stock is not infinite. At the counter, every hand is counted.
entries.gt_42ebfd6e4b3025: I sell cartridges one by one because the queue does not die by the box.
entries.gt_44f0406ee57ae5: The notebook is full. New debts are not written over old ones.
entries.gt_46603bc90f7526: The row is closed until inspection.
entries.gt_47a6af2436f5aa: The raid is already delayed, but the market has not calmed.
entries.gt_55869edd7d6dc9: Zhoka Knife: "Return twenty-four nines in a row. For a full row I will give shells and say which cabinet is unguarded today."
entries.gt_5e1ca91d48c3ef: If you are buying salvation, do not haggle as if it can be returned.
entries.gt_611b4c92b715cd: After a wet samosbor, dry bread goes like a document.
entries.gt_65811f3a7a65c6: Pay off the eighty-eight now, while the guards still think it is arithmetic.
entries.gt_6d396a7e1706f0: A debt can be closed with money, paper, or a person. Money is better.
entries.gt_6e65b704ad0d87: The kitchen takes water, Floor 69 takes parts, the NII takes samples. The market takes anything that arrives.
entries.gt_6f1851da40f8b6: Whoever handed evidence upstairs sold not a thing, but a trail behind them.
entries.gt_70d13b4fe059bc: If the raid came early, someone paid with someone else's time.
entries.gt_7314f768395e84: A wrong route is still a route, it just takes more.
entries.gt_7d482cd7d9c3f4: A password is not spoken. It is lost next to someone who knows how to listen.
entries.gt_7fba64b05ff3b8: Document wet - discount. Stamp intact - conversation continues.
entries.gt_801219629c832d: Want it cheaper - bring goods, lower the heat, or close someone's debt.
entries.gt_83646194e6fc0c: A debt without an owner is a rumor. A debt with an owner is a schedule.
entries.gt_87c9d60e165040: The weapon row does not like discounts. A discount sounds like a denunciation.
entries.gt_8a474d2f2a7433: If goods disappear, the loss will find a witness by itself.
entries.gt_8bf09c6897d711: The route is not free. I just pay with silence today.
entries.gt_90bfa1326faddb: Mikhail Debt: "Eighty-eight rubles - and I cross your line out until the evening inspection."
entries.gt_91540718fa9208: A raid does not rob the market. A raid hides goods until they stop being goods.
entries.gt_9cd3284fb1203f: 88: a document opens the door once, then opens a case.
entries.gt_9d5be4968776fa: You can forge a stub, a queue, and a route. A witness is better not forged.
entries.gt_a3a687e9d9fe8d: If you stole from the crate, count cartridges aloud; I will find the remainder by your voice.
entries.gt_a467440147ccfb: Zlata Silence: "Find Sasha Hatch and tell him the hatch sleeps today. Do not play hero, just carry the words."
entries.gt_a53b2889919f44: You can buy a Liquidator token cheaper than blood, but dearer than an honest explanation.
entries.gt_0170823d41dc56: A key does not ask whether you are going legally. The logbook asks later.
entries.gt_06b8a5fdc6c661: Your appointment has been entered in pencil. Pencil is harder than an order here.
entries.gt_0b61d8dc82ed0a: Bring a forgery as evidence and there will be an act. Try to pass with it and there will be an ambush.
entries.gt_1276b41295b285: Appointments are not received. Appointments are remembered in front of witnesses.
entries.gt_12a3299dffc83e: The ambush is closed until the next handsome stub.
entries.gt_1358858b19c259: Audit heat rises to three notches. Then the corridor starts asking for a surname by itself.
entries.gt_24f6537e5e8a04: The archive toll is not a bribe. A bribe is embarrassed by a receipt.
entries.gt_27ee6dc4a6b041: Warn the market and you get debtors. Help me and you get enemies with a stamp.
entries.gt_33231673370cc6: I do not audit money. Money is always guilty. I look for who helped it.
entries.gt_35c6a8dca3a6e0: Storage of Carts and Other People's Coats
entries.gt_3e183f8aeb5919: A stamp does not lie. The hand that tried too hard lies.
entries.gt_3e696b59348a45: Front Hall of the Living Queue
entries.gt_40c951b2a334ac: The service route is quiet until someone slams a cart.
entries.gt_42e635551e8826: The door opens quietly; audit does not rise.
entries.gt_47e9f5b05ca0c6: Do not stand by the cashbox after the siren: money loves hermodoors more than people.
entries.gt_58f760c48296a6: The Upper Bureau accepts those they have already decided to accept.
entries.gt_5e78b03658dea5: The cashier sells archive clearance for money; the alternative remains stealing the cashbox or exposing it by act.
entries.gt_5fb23730b2231f: Auditor Lev: "Two denunciations and a folder on Market 88 will become a case. The case will become audit heat."
entries.gt_6095419686f6a8: The missing personal file lies where cabinets breathe other people's names.
entries.gt_6a91fcd6f902be: Passage for money opened; audit receives a weak trace.
entries.gt_77ef451d1dc40b: Tolik Clean: "Return the cleaning kit. I will show the service route where guards look at the carpet, not at you."
entries.gt_77f5fc842750ed: You can avoid paying. Then bring an act saying the toll is illegal, and we will all pretend to be surprised.
entries.gt_78f1579528ffc2: A receipt is quieter than a key. But a key is faster.
entries.gt_7bc51980e76422: The service bypass avoids the main post if the key was received from Tolik.
entries.gt_8237759479a4af: Service Stair to the Upper Stamps
entries.gt_88baec5bc68c11: Madam Iskra: "An official pass stub - and the main post recognizes your appointment without noise."
entries.gt_8af241851e5e74: Go by service. The guards there are too lazy to look down.
entries.gt_94d44ed21ed3a6: With a clean stub the passage is open; the forgery can be handed over as evidence, or the ambush folder can be stolen with audit rising.
entries.gt_95639f9a4c93c4: I only wash the floor. Doors dirty themselves with keys.
entries.gt_9a96c2ac3efc92: Anna Nameless: "Bring the missing personal file. I will erase death from the page where it looks legal."
entries.gt_a46bf61492fa11: Tolik Clean: "If you reach Counting 88, tell Marta: Lev is already counting their receipts."
entries.gt_a5cbe0cb0c5e38: Clean paper passes by. Nervous paper brings its owner.
entries.gt_abcd8ebc0e31af: A forged stub comes here by itself. We only put out the chair.
entries.gt_ac7fab8a15785f: The acceleration fee exists only in conversations nobody records.
entries.gt_ae48fc316e53e4: If I carry the act outside, they will notice me. If I erase the name, they will notice someone else.
entries.gt_aef106b344395c: If madam asks, I did not see you. I only see dust at all.
entries.gt_afa41f0ca185cf: Archive Toll Cashier: "Eighty-eight rubles - and the archive passage recognizes you as a reader, not a violator."
entries.gt_b369961d409c43: Downstairs they buried me by mistake. Upstairs they said the mistake had already been approved.
